latin: Spes res bona est, fortasse optima rerum, et res bona numquam perit. amice mi, spera. spes muri carceris transcendit.

questions.target: A good thing, maybe the best of things
choices: A good thing, maybe the best of things

translation: Hope is a good thing, maybe the best of things, and a good thing never perishes. My friend, hope. Hope transcends the walls of the prison.
